analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet merely announces a live press briefing with the Coronavirus Task Force. It is informational without evaluative language or framing. Evaluation per narrative: US1 (honorable tradition) – not referenced. US2 (admirable society) – no mention of society, groups, or heroes. US3 (hostile enemies) – no adversaries identified. US4 (force for good) – no claim of humanitarian leadership or values. US5 (great international ally) – no mention of allies or support. US6 (at the forefront) – while a task force could imply coordination or leadership, the tweet does not state or imply U.S. leadership or superiority; it’s purely an event notice. Conclusion: No listed narrative is promoted.
